allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('./lib/settings'\); s.updateSettings\({ activeSessions: [] }\); console.log\('Cleared sessions'\);")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\('./lib/settings'\); s.updateSettings\({ activeSessions: [] }\); console.log\('Cleared'\);")

PowerShell($pidFile = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DR Launcher\\server.pid"; if \(Test-Path $pidFile\) { $raw = Get-Content $pidFile -Raw; $procId = [int]\($raw.Trim\(\).Split\(":"\)[0]\); try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $procId" } catch { "Process already dead" } } else { "No PID file" })
Bash(node -e "require\('./lib/preferences'\); require\('./lib/history'\); require\('./lib/settings'\); console.log\('All modules load OK'\)")
Bash(node -e "require\('./lib/sync'\); require\('./lib/cloud'\); console.log\('Sync + cloud modules load OK'\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'server\\.js' } | Stop-Process -Force -Confirm:$false; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1)

PowerShell($signalFile = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DR Launcher\\tray-signal-test.tmp"; Set-Content -Path $signalFile -Value "" -Encoding utf8; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "powershell.exe" -ArgumentList "-NoProfile","-STA","-WindowStyle","Hidden","-ExecutionPolicy","Bypass","-File","C:\\Users\\ConorBarnett\\AI Project\\dr-launcher\\lib\\scripts\\tray.ps1","-Port","3456","-SignalFile",$signalFile,"-NodePid","35068" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $proc.HasExited)

PowerShell($signalFile = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\DR Launcher\\tray-signal-test.tmp"; Set-Content -Path $signalFile -Value "" -Encoding utf8; powershell.exe -NoProfile -STA -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "C:\\Users\\ConorBarnett\\AI Project\\dr-launcher\\lib\\scripts\\tray.ps1" -Port 3456 -SignalFile $signalFile -NodePid 35068 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id $proc.Id | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; "Tray process is running")

PowerShell($cscPath = Join-Path $env:SystemRoot "Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\v4.0.30319\\csc.exe"; if \(Test-Path $cscPath\) { "Found csc.exe: $cscPath"; & $cscPath /target:winexe /optimize /reference:System.Windows.Forms.dll "/out:C:\\Users\\ConorBarnett\\AI Project\\dr-launcher\\packaging\\DR-Launcher.exe" "C:\\Users\\ConorBarnett\\AI Project\\dr-launcher\\packaging\\Launcher.cs" } else { "csc.exe not found" })
